filesModified.purpose: Added Load More button hover fix for light mode to ensure visible gradient background

syncStatus.details: PHP-only changes (card partials and Archive.php/js). No TSX changes needed. All modifications maintain existing patterns.

testPage.note: Test page already has light mode variations from previous implementation. No new variations needed for these fixes.

implementationNotes: Changed resource/policy card backgrounds from bg-white to bg-off-white in light mode
Cards now blend seamlessly with the page's off-white background (#FBF6E2)
Card definition relies on border-charcoal/10 border rather than contrasting white fill
Added cursor-pointer to all filter interaction buttons (pills and Clear All)
Cursor-pointer added to both server-rendered and AJAX-generated filter pills
Light mode Load More button now has explicit gradient background on hover
Gradient is linear-gradient(90deg, neon-green 0%, blue 70%) with charcoal border and text
This ensures the button is always visible against the off-white page background
Dark mode Load More button behavior unchanged (white fill at xl breakpoint for blog)
All changes are CSS/class additions - no structural HTML changes

userFeedback: Resource/policy cards should use off-white background instead of white in light mode
Filter pills should show pointer cursor on hover
Load More button appears white-on-white on hover in light mode
previousIssues: Light mode cards had bright white background that contrasted too much with off-white page
Filter buttons used default cursor, not indicating interactivity clearly
Load More button gradient animation not visible enough on off-white background
